title: Moderation Update — April 29, 2026
body: The moderation queue has been triaged. Actions taken: 2 bans (spam/phishing and targeted harassment), 2 warnings (off-topic posting and suspicious automation), and 2 reports closed with no action (false positives involving trusted community members). We remain committed to keeping this community safe and welcoming. If you see something, report it — every report is reviewed. Thank you for helping us maintain a healthy space.
